meta.desc_resolved: A melee attack that also damages yourself.

meta.name: EABILITY_BOTTOMSUP_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Gain 5HP. Can only be used when standing in water.

meta.name: EABILITY_COUNTERSPELL_NAME
meta.desc_resolved:
Counter the next spell an enemy casts.
If counterspell isn't triggered by your next turn, absorb it to gain +2 Damage and +2 All Stats Up.

meta.name: EABILITY_BRAINMISSLE_NAME
meta.desc_resolved: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.

meta.desc_resolved: Inhale a unit, then spit it out.
